name: hex-ui
description: Hex UI — AI-native component library for LLMs and humans

items.name: aspect-ratio
items.description: Constrain children to a specific width-to-height ratio (e.g. 16/9 for video, 1/1 for square).

items.name: avatar
items.description: A user profile image with a fallback (usually initials) rendered when the image is missing or fails to load. Built on Radix UI Avatar — AvatarFallback accepts a delayMs prop to avoid flashing during fast loads.

items.name: badge
items.description: A small status indicator with multiple style variants. Used for tags, statuses, and categorization.

items.name: button
items.description: A versatile button component with multiple variants, sizes, and states. Supports icons, loading state, and composition via asChild.

items.name: checkbox
items.description: An accessible checkbox with checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states. Built on Radix UI.

items.name: input
items.description: A styled text input with smooth focus transitions, shadow effects, and full HTML input compatibility.

items.name: label
items.description: An accessible label component built on Radix UI Label primitive. Associates with form controls via htmlFor.

items.name: progress
items.description: A horizontal progress bar showing completion from 0 to 100%. Built on Radix UI Progress.

items.name: radio-group
items.description: A set of mutually exclusive radio options. Built on Radix UI RadioGroup with roving focus and arrow-key navigation.

items.name: scroll-area
items.description: A scrollable region with custom-styled scrollbars that match the design system. Content must be explicitly sized.

items.name: select
items.description: An accessible dropdown select for choosing one option from a list. Built on Radix UI Select with full keyboard navigation, typeahead, and RTL support.

items.name: separator
items.description: A visual divider between content sections with horizontal or vertical orientation.

items.name: skeleton
items.description: A pulsing placeholder shown while content is loading. Pair with explicit dimensions.

items.name: slider
items.description: A range input with draggable thumbs. Supports single value, ranges (two thumbs), custom steps, and full keyboard control.

items.name: switch
items.description: An accessible toggle switch for instant on/off settings. Built on Radix UI.

items.name: textarea
items.description: A styled multi-line text input with smooth focus transitions and shadow effects.

items.name: toggle
items.description: A two-state button that stays pressed when toggled on. Used for formatting toolbars (bold/italic) or option toggles.

items.name: toggle-group
items.description: A set of toggles where one or multiple can be pressed. Inherits Toggle's variant/size via context. Useful for alignment/formatting toolbars.

items.name: accordion
items.description: A vertically stacked set of collapsible content sections. Built on Radix UI Accordion.

items.name: alert
items.description: An inline notification banner for important messages. Supports default and destructive variants with optional leading icon.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.description: A modal dialog for destructive confirmations. The user must explicitly accept or cancel — there is no close button. Built on Radix UI AlertDialog.

items.name: card
items.description: A container component with header, content, and footer sections. Includes subtle shadow and hover effects.

items.name: dialog
items.description: A modal dialog that interrupts the user with important content. Built on Radix UI with focus trap, escape handling, and scroll lock.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.description: A menu of actions displayed to the user when a trigger is activated. Supports items, checkboxes, radio groups, sub-menus, and keyboard shortcuts.

items.name: form
items.description: A form primitive built on react-hook-form + zod. Provides Form/FormField/FormItem/FormLabel/FormControl/FormDescription/FormMessage with automatic aria wiring and error display.

items.name: popover
items.description: Floating content anchored to a trigger element. Non-modal by default — clicks outside dismiss it. Use for inline forms, info, or quick actions.

items.name: sonner
items.description: Ephemeral toast notifications via Sonner. Render <Toaster /> once at app root, then call toast() anywhere.

items.name: tabs
items.description: A tabbed interface with accessible keyboard navigation. Built on Radix UI Tabs.

items.name: tooltip
items.description: A small floating label that reveals on hover or focus. Wrap your app in TooltipProvider, then use Tooltip/TooltipTrigger/TooltipContent per tooltip.
